# 🚀 QUICK START - Deployment Commands

# Generated by deploy-prep-agent

# Copy-paste ready commands for deployment

## PRE-DEPLOYMENT BLOCKER (MUST DO FIRST)

### ⚠️ CRITICAL: Register workers.dev subdomain

**URL**: https://dash.cloudflare.com/1192502f519a5ae3cbf3d934e6f33ef2/workers/onboarding
**Time**: 2-3 minutes
**Status**: BLOCKING - Cannot deploy without this

---

## DEPLOYMENT SEQUENCE

### Step 1: Deploy to Staging

```bash
npx wrangler deploy --env staging
```

### Step 2: Verify Staging (replace `<subdomain>`)

```bash
STAGING_URL="https://do-deal-relay-staging.<subdomain>.workers.dev"

# Quick verification
curl -s "$STAGING_URL/health" | jq .
curl -s "$STAGING_URL/metrics"
curl -X POST -s "$STAGING_URL/api/discover" | jq .
```

### Step 3: Deploy to Production

```bash
npx wrangler deploy
```

### Step 4: Initialize KV Data

```bash
# Seed source registry
npx wrangler kv key put \
  --namespace-id be3c0fc148b749b49a59aa7cfa23e3ac \
  "registry" \
  '[{"domain":"trading212.com","trust_initial":0.7,"active":true}]'
```

### Step 5: Set Secrets (Optional but Recommended)

```bash
# GitHub token (for notifications & commits)
npx wrangler secret put GITHUB_TOKEN

# Telegram (optional notifications)
npx wrangler secret put TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
npx wrangler secret put TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID
```

### Step 6: Verify Production

```bash
PROD_URL="https://do-deal-relay.<subdomain>.workers.dev"

# Use verification script
./scripts/verify-deployment.sh <subdomain> production

# Or manually:
curl -s "$PROD_URL/health" | jq .
curl -s "$PROD_URL/api/status" | jq .
npx wrangler triggers list
```

---

## ONE-LINER DEPLOYMENT

After subdomain is registered:

```bash
# Complete deployment (copy-paste as one block)
npx wrangler deploy --env staging && \
  sleep 5 && \
  npx wrangler deploy && \
  npx wrangler kv key put --namespace-id be3c0fc148b749b49a59aa7cfa23e3ac "registry" '[{"domain":"trading212.com","trust_initial":0.7,"active":true}]' && \
  ./scripts/verify-deployment.sh <subdomain> production
```

---

## KV NAMESPACES REFERENCE

| Binding       | ID                               | Usage             |
| ------------- | -------------------------------- | ----------------- |
| DEALS_PROD    | 23ee9b8c9e2748e5880f476b8b57a524 | Production deals  |
| DEALS_STAGING | b0db85b92fae45c1895152737ab72649 | Staging deals     |
| DEALS_LOG     | 1f1a901fd6fb4dffbdcc86aa4a914ba8 | Pipeline logs     |
| DEALS_LOCK    | e3ab520eafd5430ab72978e78bdd257e | Lock/coordination |
| DEALS_SOURCES | be3c0fc148b749b49a59aa7cfa23e3ac | Source registry   |

---

## API ENDPOINTS (8 Total)

### GET Endpoints

```bash
BASE="https://do-deal-relay.<subdomain>.workers.dev"

curl -s "$BASE/health"              # Health status
curl -s "$BASE/metrics"           # Prometheus metrics
curl -s "$BASE/deals"             # List active deals
curl -s "$BASE/deals.json"        # Full snapshot with stats
curl -s "$BASE/api/status"        # Pipeline status
curl -s "$BASE/api/log?count=10"  # Recent logs
```

### POST Endpoints

```bash
# Trigger manual discovery
curl -X POST "$BASE/api/discover"

# Submit a new deal
curl -X POST \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"code":"TEST123","url":"https://example.com","metadata":{"title":"Test","reward":{"type":"cash","value":50}}}' \
  "$BASE/api/submit"
```

---

## VERIFICATION COMMANDS

### Check All 8 Endpoints

```bash
./scripts/verify-deployment.sh <subdomain> [staging|production]
```

### Check Health

```bash
curl -s https://do-deal-relay.<subdomain>.workers.dev/health | jq .
```

### Check Scheduled Triggers

```bash
npx wrangler triggers list
```

### View Logs

```bash
npx wrangler tail
```

---

## TROUBLESHOOTING

### Deployment Fails

```bash
# Check logs
npx wrangler deploy --env staging 2>&1 | tee deploy.log

# Verbose output
npx wrangler deploy --env staging --verbose
```

### KV Issues

```bash
# List all keys in a namespace
npx wrangler kv key list --namespace-id be3c0fc148b749b49a59aa7cfa23e3ac

# Get specific key
npx wrangler kv key get --namespace-id be3c0fc148b749b49a59aa7cfa23e3ac "registry"
```

### Rollback

```bash
# See docs/ROLLBACK_PROCEDURES.md
git log --oneline -5  # Find last good commit
git checkout <commit>
npx wrangler deploy
```

---

## SUCCESS CRITERIA

✅ All 8 endpoints return 200/201  
✅ /health shows "healthy" status  
✅ KV registry initialized  
✅ Cron trigger configured  
✅ (Optional) GitHub token configured  
✅ (Optional) Telegram configured
